props.name: action
props.description: Action identifier passed in click events for event delegation patterns.

props.name: actionArg
props.description: Single argument value passed with the action in click events.

props.name: actionArgs
props.description: Multiple argument values passed with the action in click events.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When true, prevents user interaction and applies disabled styling.

props.name: leadingIcon
props.description: Icon displayed before the button text.

props.name: size
props.description: Controls the size of the button. Use "compact" for inline actions or space-constrained layouts.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: trailingIcon
props.description: Icon displayed after the button text.

props.name: type
props.description: Sets the visual style of the button. Use "primary" for main actions, "secondary" for alternative actions, "tertiary" for low-emphasis actions, and "start" for prominent call-to-action buttons.

props.name: variant
props.description: Sets the color variant for semantic meaning. Use "destructive" for delete or irreversible actions, "inverse" for dark backgrounds.

props.name: width
props.description: Sets a custom width for the button (e.g., "200px" or "100%").

events.name: onClick
events.description: Callback fired when the button is clicked.
